item.title: Ugro Capital Q4 FY26: Profit Growth Masks Structural Concerns Amid Sharp Stock Decline
item.description: Ugro Capital Ltd., a small-cap non-banking financial company, reported a net profit of ₹51.11 crores for Q4 FY26, marking a sequential growth of 10.46% from ₹46.27 crores in Q3 FY26. However, the quarter's performance reveals troubling undercurrents that have contributed to a dramatic 41.85% stock price decline over the past year, with shares currently trading at ₹112.66, down 43.64% from their 52-week high of ₹199.90. Time: Apr 21 2026 09:31 PM IST

item.title: Nestle India Q4 FY26: Premium Valuation Justified by Stellar 27% Profit Growth
item.description: Nestle India Ltd., the country's leading packaged foods manufacturer, delivered an exceptional performance in Q4 FY26, posting consolidated net profit of ₹1,110.90 crores—a robust 27.18% year-on-year growth that comfortably surpassed market consensus. The stock responded enthusiastically, surging 7.09% to ₹1,378.70 following the results announcement, with the company's ₹2.52 lakh crore market capitalisation cementing its position as the second-largest player in India's FMCG sector. Time: Apr 21 2026 09:30 PM IST

item.title: Groww Posts 122% Profit Surge in Q4 FY26, But Premium Valuation Raises Concerns
item.description: Billionbrains Garage Ventures Ltd., operating under the Groww brand, delivered a spectacular performance in Q4 FY26, posting consolidated net profit of ₹686.35 crores—a remarkable 122.06% year-on-year surge and 25.49% quarter-on-quarter growth. The fintech platform's revenue climbed 87.93% YoY to ₹1,505.37 crores, whilst operating margins expanded to an impressive 62.35%. However, the stock's meteoric rise—up 37.08% year-to-date and trading at a premium 64x price-to-earnings multiple—has prompted questions about sustainability and fair value. Time: Apr 21 2026 09:17 PM IST

item.title: PNB Housing Finance Q4 FY26: Strong Profit Surge Masks Underlying Concerns
item.description: PNB Housing Finance Ltd. reported a robust 26.03% quarter-on-quarter surge in net profit for Q4 FY26, reaching ₹655.80 crores, yet the stock's 8.09% rally on April 21 failed to mask deeper concerns plaguing this housing finance major. With a market capitalisation of ₹25,854 crores, the Punjab National Bank-promoted lender delivered its strongest quarterly performance in recent history, but persistent structural challenges and weak long-term growth metrics continue to weigh on investor sentiment. Time: Apr 21 2026 09:17 PM IST

item.title: NELCO Q4 FY26: Margin Pressures Persist Despite Revenue Growth
item.description: NELCO Ltd., a Tata Power subsidiary operating in the IT hardware sector, reported consolidated net profit of ₹1.09 crores for Q4 FY26, marking a dramatic reversal from the ₹1.19 crore loss in the previous quarter. However, the year-on-year comparison reveals a concerning 126.72% decline from the ₹4.08 crore profit posted in Q4 FY25. The stock responded positively to the sequential recovery, surging 5.92% to ₹715.10 on April 21, 2026, though it remains 38.43% below its 52-week high of ₹1,161.50. Time: Apr 21 2026 09:17 PM IST

item.title: Bank of Maharashtra Q4 FY26: Stellar Profit Growth Masks Asset Quality Concerns
item.description: Bank of Maharashtra Ltd., the Pune-headquartered public sector bank with a market capitalisation of ₹60,648 crores, delivered a commanding performance in Q4 FY26, posting net profit of ₹2,014.09 crores—a robust 13.19% quarter-on-quarter surge and an impressive 34.89% year-on-year leap. The stellar results triggered a sharp 5.95% rally in the stock to ₹80.16, breaching its 52-week high of ₹76.99 and extending its remarkable three-year gain of 188.24%. Yet beneath this euphoric surface lies a nuanced story of margin compression, elevated provisioning, and a shareholding pattern shift that warrants closer scrutiny from discerning investors. Time: Apr 21 2026 09:16 PM IST
